libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For version 2.0.0 tests, use the jakarta.activation package names rather than javax.activation. Focus coverage on normal Activation API use such as CommandMap, MailcapCommandMap, FileTypeMap, MimetypesFileTypeMap, DataHandler, DataSource, and CommandInfo.

deterministic_setup.reason: The API jar references com.sun.activation.registries classes from MailcapCommandMap and MimetypesFileTypeMap; adding the matching implementation jar makes normal Jakarta Activation runtime usage reachable while keeping the target API artifact on the classpath.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8769 [Automation] javac compile fails for jakarta.activation:jakarta.activation-api:2.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The implementation dependency contains overlapping jakarta.activation classes as well as the missing com.sun.activation.registries support classes, so local Gradle/native-image verification must confirm classpath behavior.
Existing 1.2.1 tests and metadata are javax.activation-based and cannot be mechanically reused for 2.0.0 without namespace updates.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: jakarta.activation-api:2.0.0 is an API jar with jakarta.activation classes but no com.sun.activation.registries implementation classes; normal CommandMap/FileTypeMap usage fails at runtime without the matching implementation artifact.
